name: tabtogether
description: Send tabs to multiple devices simultaneously.
author: Ron Katzir

scripts.minify:js: node -e "const cp = require('child_process'), fs = require('fs'), walk = d => fs.existsSync(d) && fs.readdirSync(d).forEach(f => { const p = d + '/' + f; if (fs.statSync(p).isDirectory()) walk(p); else if (f.endsWith('.js')) { console.log('Minifying JS:', p); cp.execSync('npx terser \"' + p + '\" -o \"' + p + '\" --module --compress --mangle'); } }); ['dist/background', 'dist/common', 'dist/core', 'dist/ui'].forEach(walk);"
scripts.minify:css: node -e "const cp = require('child_process'), fs = require('fs'), walk = d => fs.existsSync(d) && fs.readdirSync(d).forEach(f => { const p = d + '/' + f; if (fs.statSync(p).isDirectory()) walk(p); else if (f.endsWith('.css')) { console.log('Minifying CSS:', p); cp.execSync('npx cleancss -o \"' + p + '\" \"' + p + '\"'); } }); ['dist/ui'].forEach(walk);"
scripts.minify:html: node -e "const cp = require('child_process'), fs = require('fs'), walk = d => fs.existsSync(d) && fs.readdirSync(d).forEach(f => { const p = d + '/' + f; if (fs.statSync(p).isDirectory()) walk(p); else if (f.endsWith('.html')) { console.log('Minifying HTML:', p); cp.execSync('npx html-minifier-terser --collapse-whitespace --remove-comments -o \"' + p + '\" \"' + p + '\"'); } }); ['dist/ui'].forEach(walk);"
scripts.minify: npm run minify:js && npm run minify:css && npm run minify:html
scripts.prepare-dist: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.mkdirSync('dist', { recursive: true }); ['manifest.json', 'LICENSE', 'SECURITY.md', 'README.md'].forEach(f => { if (fs.existsSync(f)) fs.copyFileSync(f, 'dist/' + f); }); ['background', 'common', 'core', 'ui', 'icons'].forEach(d => { if (fs.existsSync(d)) fs.cpSync(d, 'dist/' + d, { recursive: true }); });"
scripts.build:prod: npm run prepare-dist && npm run minify
scripts.build: npm run build:prod && web-ext build --source-dir dist --artifacts-dir web-ext-artifacts --overwrite-dest
scripts.package: echo 'Use GitHub Actions workflow for packaging.'
